meta.title: About | D7460N
meta.description: Our disciplined approach to structural web simplification.

intro: Structural simplification of modern web architecture.
Our method restores clarity to the browser layer.

content: The guiding principle behind this work is separation of concerns enforced at a structural level. HTML remains structural. CSS remains declarative and state-aware. JavaScript becomes strictly a data transport layer.

By preventing presentation logic from leaking into the data layer, and by preventing runtime mutation from redefining structure, we create systems that are easier to reason about and easier to govern.
This approach recognizes that the browser already provides powerful native capabilities that are frequently bypassed in favor of abstraction layers.
Over time, abstraction debt compounds. Removing that debt requires architectural restraint and intentional boundaries.
The result is a predictable, inspectable, maintainable application surface aligned with long-term enterprise sustainability.

outro: Architecture should reduce entropy, not amplify it.
Clarity at the browser layer produces clarity across the system.
